case_title: CECELIA KENNEDY VS. SHIRLEY WHITLEY et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $281.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WHITLEY, SHIRLEY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY, CECELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITLEY, SHIRLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5174 3RD STREET, APT. #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
